name: Bombombini Gusini
lore:
Lore of Bombombini Gusini
                                    


A character that uniquely fuses elements of a goose and a bomber aircraft. It is likely that the design is inspired by the B-29 model, notable for its four engines. This character emerges as a formidable force against the Bombardi Crocodilo and is also depicted as the sibling of Bardiro Crocodilo. Additionally, he takes pleasure in the act of bombing individuals. In Italian pronunciation, the "s" between vowels is articulated distinctly, which is why Guini is pronounced rather than Gugini.
Typically, he engages in bombing missions and has the ability to transform into a combat robot. However, his performance record has been less than stellar.
Description original text
Bombombini Gusini! Fratello Bombardiro Crocodilo che svolge tutte le stesse funzioni del fratello e dà bombe alla gente. Uno scherzo per chi si è trasferito, un georgiano cammina portando 2 angurie sotto le ascelle, poi un uomo gli chiede: "che ore sono?" "Ascolta tieni l'anguria." L'uomo la prese e il georgiano alzando le mani disse, come faccio a saperlo?
Spring Spring Beanie Gugini! Brothers Bombiri do the same thing as Crocodilo and distribute bombs to people. For those who move, a Georgian passes by two watermelons between the armpits, and one person asks him, "What time is it?" "Please listen to the watermelon." The man receives a watermelon and the Georgian raises his hand, "How do I know?"
